notes: v1.14.102 - Ref redesign: card-grid landing + drill-in (a new nav layer OVER the existing rf-* panels; reuse, don't rebuild). Entering Ref via the bottom nav now shows a 6-card corner-bracket grid (Optics/Hardware/CLI-IB/HW Ref/Know/Compass) instead of the flat category pill-row. Cards route via the existing showRefTab('rf-...'); the Compass card deep-links its real home (Hardware 'Cage Nut' subtab #pw-compass, folded in by redesign_homeCompass - one surface, two entry points, no duplicate). showMode('ref') adds #pg-ref.rf-grid (grid view); showRefTab removes it to drill into a panel with its existing sub-nav + content intact. New ref_showGrid() back affordance (#ref-back header) + ref_setBackTitle + ref_openCompass. Search keeps the existing #srch (no new engine). Category pill-row hidden under body.rd; panel contents/sub-navs unedited. Legacy (?legacy=1 / ?redesign=0) byte-identical.
